notes: High-MTBF ATA drives targeting midline/near-line enterprise storage; the principal product brand the category strategy was built around
Maxtor's high-performance SCSI enterprise drives; positioned as complementary 'on-line' brand alongside MaXLine
Parallel ATA — the interface technology underpinning MaXLine drives; transitioning to SATA at time of study
Primary enterprise storage architecture for large Fortune 500 companies surveyed; 90%+ of large enterprise respondents
The core category concept being proposed — read-only non-changing data stored on ATA/midline drives
Aberdeen's CRM category-creation for Siebel is the strategic analogy cited for the midline category plan
